2007#
2008#  Example: to enable list and generic events, from the point of view of the
2009#           event name, use:
2010#
2011#  notify-keyspace-events Elg
2012#
2013#  Example 2: to get the stream of the expired keys subscribing to channel
2014#             name __keyevent@0__:expired use:
2015#
2016#  notify-keyspace-events Ex
2017#
2018#  By default all notifications are disabled because most users don't need
2019#  this feature and the feature has some overhead. Note that if you don't
2020#  specify at least one of K or E, no events will be delivered.
2021notify-keyspace-events ""
2022
2023############################### ADVANCED CONFIG ###############################
2024
2025# Hashes are encoded using a memory efficient data structure when they have a
2026# small number of entries, and the biggest entry does not exceed a given
2027# threshold. These thresholds can be configured using the following directives.
2028hash-max-listpack-entries 512
2029hash-max-listpack-value 64
2030
2031# Lists are also encoded in a special way to save a lot of space.
2032# The number of entries allowed per internal list node can be specified
2033# as a fixed maximum size or a maximum number of elements.
2034# For a fixed maximum size, use -5 through -1, meaning:
2035# -5: max size: 64 Kb  <-- not recommended for normal workloads
2036# -4: max size: 32 Kb  <-- not recommended
2037# -3: max size: 16 Kb  <-- probably not recommended
2038# -2: max size: 8 Kb   <-- good
2039# -1: max size: 4 Kb   <-- good
2040# Positive numbers mean store up to _exactly_ that number of elements
2041# per list node.
2042# The highest performing option is usually -2 (8 Kb size) or -1 (4 Kb size),
2043# but if your use case is unique, adjust the settings as necessary.
2044list-max-listpack-size -2
2045
2046# Lists may also be compressed.
2047# Compress depth is the number of quicklist ziplist nodes from *each* side of
2048# the list to *exclude* from compression.  The head and tail of the list
2049# are always uncompressed for fast push/pop operations.  Settings are:
2050# 0: disable all list compression
2051# 1: depth 1 means "don't start compressing until after 1 node into the list,
2052#    going from either the head or tail"
2053#    So: [head]->node->node->...->node->[tail]
2054#    [head], [tail] will always be uncompressed; inner nodes will compress.
2055# 2: [head]->[next]->node->node->...->node->[prev]->[tail]
2056#    2 here means: don't compress head or head->next or tail->prev or tail,
2057#    but compress all nodes between them.
2058# 3: [head]->[next]->[next]->node->node->...->node->[prev]->[prev]->[tail]
2059# etc.
2060list-compress-depth 0
2061
2062# Sets have a special encoding when a set is composed
2063# of just strings that happen to be integers in radix 10 in the range
2064# of 64 bit signed integers.
2065# The following configuration setting sets the limit in the size of the
2066# set in order to use this special memory saving encoding.
2067set-max-intset-entries 512
2068
2069# Sets containing non-integer values are also encoded using a memory efficient
2070# data structure when they have a small number of entries, and the biggest entry
2071# does not exceed a given threshold. These thresholds can be configured using
2072# the following directives.
2073set-max-listpack-entries 128
2074set-max-listpack-value 64
2075
2076# Similarly to hashes and lists, sorted sets are also specially encoded in
2077# order to save a lot of space. This encoding is only used when the length and
2078# elements of a sorted set are below the following limits:
2079zset-max-listpack-entries 128
2080zset-max-listpack-value 64
2081
2082# HyperLogLog sparse representation bytes limit. The limit includes the
2083# 16 bytes header. When a HyperLogLog using the sparse representation crosses
2084# this limit, it is converted into the dense representation.
2085#
2086# A value greater than 16000 is totally useless, since at that point the
2087# dense representation is more memory efficient.
2088#
2089# The suggested value is ~ 3000 in order to have the benefits of
2090# the space efficient encoding without slowing down too much PFADD,
2091# which is O(N) with the sparse encoding. The value can be raised to
2092# ~ 10000 when CPU is not a concern, but space is, and the data set is
2093# composed of many HyperLogLogs with cardinality in the 0 - 15000 range.
2094hll-sparse-max-bytes 3000
2095
2096# Streams macro node max size / items. The stream data structure is a radix
2097# tree of big nodes that encode multiple items inside. Using this configuration
2098# it is possible to configure how big a single node can be in bytes, and the
2099# maximum number of items it may contain before switching to a new node when
2100# appending new stream entries. If any of the following settings are set to
2101# zero, the limit is ignored, so for instance it is possible to set just a
2102# max entries limit by setting max-bytes to 0 and max-entries to the desired
2103# value.
2104stream-node-max-bytes 4096
2105stream-node-max-entries 100
2106
2107# Active rehashing uses 1 millisecond every 100 milliseconds of CPU time in
2108# order to help rehashing the main Redis hash table (the one mapping top-level
2109# keys to values). The hash table implementation Redis uses (see dict.c)
2110# performs a lazy rehashing: the more operation you run into a hash table
2111# that is rehashing, the more rehashing "steps" are performed, so if the
2112# server is idle the rehashing is never complete and some more memory is used
2113# by the hash table.
2114#
2115# The default is to use this millisecond 10 times every second in order to
2116# actively rehash the main dictionaries, freeing memory when possible.
2117#
2118# If unsure:
2119# use "activerehashing no" if you have hard latency requirements and it is
2120# not a good thing in your environment that Redis can reply from time to time
2121# to queries with 2 milliseconds delay.
2122#
2123# use "activerehashing yes" if you don't have such hard requirements but
2124# want to free memory asap when possible.
2125activerehashing yes
2126
2127# The client output buffer limits can be used to force disconnection of clients
2128# that are not reading data from the server fast enough for some reason (a
2129# common reason is that a Pub/Sub client can't consume messages as fast as the
2130# publisher can produce them).
2131#
2132# The limit can be set differently for the three different classes of clients:
2133#
2134# normal -> normal clients including MONITOR clients
2135# replica -> replica clients
2136# pubsub -> clients subscribed to at least one pubsub channel or pattern
2137#
2138# The syntax of every client-output-buffer-limit directive is the following:
2139#
2140# client-output-buffer-limit <class> <hard limit> <soft limit> <soft seconds>
2141#
2142# A client is immediately disconnected once the hard limit is reached, or if
2143# the soft limit is reached and remains reached for the specified number of
2144# seconds (continuously).
2145# So for instance if the hard limit is 32 megabytes and the soft limit is
2146# 16 megabytes / 10 seconds, the client will get disconnected immediately
2147# if the size of the output buffers reach 32 megabytes, but will also get
2148# disconnected if the client reaches 16 megabytes and continuously overcomes
2149# the limit for 10 seconds.
2150#
2151# By default normal clients are not limited because they don't receive data
2152# without asking (in a push way), but just after a request, so only
2153# asynchronous clients may create a scenario where data is requested faster
2154# than it can read.
2155#
2156# Instead there is a default limit for pubsub and replica clients, since
2157# subscribers and replicas receive data in a push fashion.
2158#
2159# Note that it doesn't make sense to set the replica clients output buffer
2160# limit lower than the repl-backlog-size config (partial sync will succeed
2161# and then replica will get disconnected).
2162# Such a configuration is ignored (the size of repl-backlog-size will be used).
2163# This doesn't have memory consumption implications since the replica client
2164# will share the backlog buffers memory.
2165#
2166# Both the hard or the soft limit can be disabled by setting them to zero.
2167client-output-buffer-limit normal 0 0 0
2168client-output-buffer-limit replica 256mb 64mb 60
2169client-output-buffer-limit pubsub 32mb 8mb 60
2170
2171# Client query buffers accumulate new commands. They are limited to a fixed
2172# amount by default in order to avoid that a protocol desynchronization (for
2173# instance due to a bug in the client) will lead to unbound memory usage in
2174# the query buffer. However you can configure it here if you have very special
2175# needs, such as a command with huge argument, or huge multi/exec requests or alike.
2176#
2177# client-query-buffer-limit 1gb
2178
2179# Defines how many commands in each client pipeline to decode and prefetch
2180# lookahead 16
2181
2182# In some scenarios client connections can hog up memory leading to OOM
2183# errors or data eviction. To avoid this we can cap the accumulated memory
2184# used by all client connections (all pubsub and normal clients). Once we
2185# reach that limit connections will be dropped by the server freeing up
2186# memory. The server will attempt to drop the connections using the most 
2187# memory first. We call this mechanism "client eviction".
2188#
2189# Client eviction is configured using the maxmemory-clients setting as follows:
2190# 0 - client eviction is disabled (default)
2191#
2192# A memory value can be used for the client eviction threshold,
2193# for example:
2194# maxmemory-clients 1g
2195#
2196# A percentage value (between 1% and 100%) means the client eviction threshold
2197# is based on a percentage of the maxmemory setting. For example to set client
2198# eviction at 5% of maxmemory:
2199# maxmemory-clients 5%
2200
2201# In the Redis protocol, bulk requests, that are, elements representing single
2202# strings, are normally limited to 512 mb. However you can change this limit
2203# here, but must be 1mb or greater
2204#
2205# proto-max-bulk-len 512mb
2206
2207# Redis calls an internal function to perform many background tasks, like
2208# closing connections of clients in timeout, purging expired keys that are
2209# never requested, and so forth.
2210#
2211# Not all tasks are performed with the same frequency, but Redis checks for
2212# tasks to perform according to the specified "hz" value.
2213#
2214# By default "hz" is set to 10. Raising the value will use more CPU when
2215# Redis is idle, but at the same time will make Redis more responsive when
2216# there are many keys expiring at the same time, and timeouts may be
2217# handled with more precision.
2218#
2219# The range is between 1 and 500, however a value over 100 is usually not
2220# a good idea. Most users should use the default of 10 and raise this up to
2221# 100 only in environments where very low latency is required.
2222hz 10
2223
2224# Normally it is useful to have an HZ value which is proportional to the
2225# number of clients connected. This is useful in order, for instance, to
2226# avoid too many clients are processed for each background task invocation
2227# in order to avoid latency spikes.
2228#
2229# Since the default HZ value by default is conservatively set to 10, Redis
2230# offers, and enables by default, the ability to use an adaptive HZ value
2231# which will temporarily raise when there are many connected clients.
2232#
2233# When dynamic HZ is enabled, the actual configured HZ will be used
2234# as a baseline, but multiples of the configured HZ value will be actually
2235# used as needed once more clients are connected. In this way an idle
2236# instance will use very little CPU time while a busy instance will be
2237# more responsive.
2238dynamic-hz yes
2239
2240# When a child rewrites the AOF file, if the following option is enabled
2241# the file will be fsync-ed every 4 MB of data generated. This is useful
2242# in order to commit the file to the disk more incrementally and avoid
2243# big latency spikes.
2244aof-rewrite-incremental-fsync yes
2245
2246# When redis saves RDB file, if the following option is enabled
2247# the file will be fsync-ed every 4 MB of data generated. This is useful
2248# in order to commit the file to the disk more incrementally and avoid
2249# big latency spikes.
2250rdb-save-incremental-fsync yes
2251
2252# Redis LFU eviction (see maxmemory setting) can be tuned. However it is a good
2253# idea to start with the default settings and only change them after investigating
2254# how to improve the performances and how the keys LFU change over time, which
2255# is possible to inspect via the OBJECT FREQ command.
2256#
2257# There are two tunable parameters in the Redis LFU implementation: the
2258# counter logarithm factor and the counter decay time. It is important to
2259# understand what the two parameters mean before changing them.
2260#
2261# The LFU counter is just 8 bits per key, it's maximum value is 255, so Redis
2262# uses a probabilistic increment with logarithmic behavior. Given the value
2263# of the old counter, when a key is accessed, the counter is incremented in
2264# this way:
2265#
2266# 1. A random number R between 0 and 1 is extracted.
2267# 2. A probability P is calculated as 1/(old_value*lfu_log_factor+1).
2268# 3. The counter is incremented only if R < P.
2269#
2270# The default lfu-log-factor is 10. This is a table of how the frequency
2271# counter changes with a different number of accesses with different
2272# logarithmic factors:
2273#
2274# +--------+------------+------------+------------+------------+------------+
2275# | factor | 100 hits   | 1000 hits  | 100K hits  | 1M hits    | 10M hits   |
2276# +--------+------------+------------+------------+------------+------------+
2277# | 0      | 104        | 255        | 255        | 255        | 255        |
2278# +--------+------------+------------+------------+------------+------------+
2279# | 1      | 18         | 49         | 255        | 255        | 255        |
2280# +--------+------------+------------+------------+------------+------------+
2281# | 10     | 10         | 18         | 142        | 255        | 255        |
2282# +--------+------------+------------+------------+------------+------------+
2283# | 100    | 8          | 11         | 49         | 143        | 255        |
2284# +--------+------------+------------+------------+------------+------------+
2285#
2286# NOTE: The above table was obtained by running the following commands:
2287#
2288#   redis-benchmark -n 1000000 incr foo
2289#   redis-cli object freq foo
2290#
2291# NOTE 2: The counter initial value is 5 in order to give new objects a chance
2292# to accumulate hits.
2293#
2294# The counter decay time is the time, in minutes, that must elapse in order
2295# for the key counter to be decremented.
2296#
2297# The default value for the lfu-decay-time is 1. A special value of 0 means we
2298# will never decay the counter.
2299#
2300# lfu-log-factor 10
2301# lfu-decay-time 1
2302
2303
2304# The maximum number of new client connections accepted per event-loop cycle. This configuration
2305# is set independently for TLS connections.
2306#
2307# By default, up to 10 new connection will be accepted per event-loop cycle for normal connections
2308# and up to 1 new connection per event-loop cycle for TLS connections.
2309#
2310# Adjusting this to a larger number can slightly improve efficiency for new connections
2311# at the risk of causing timeouts for regular commands on established connections.  It is
2312# not advised to change this without ensuring that all clients have limited connection
2313# pools and exponential backoff in the case of command/connection timeouts. 
2314#
2315# If your application is establishing a large number of new connections per second you should
2316# also consider tuning the value of tcp-backlog, which allows the kernel to buffer more
2317# pending connections before dropping or rejecting connections. 
2318#
2319# max-new-connections-per-cycle 10
2320# max-new-tls-connections-per-cycle 1
2321
2322
2323########################### ACTIVE DEFRAGMENTATION #######################
2324#
2325# What is active defragmentation?
2326# -------------------------------
2327#
2328# Active (online) defragmentation allows a Redis server to compact the
2329# spaces left between small allocations and deallocations of data in memory,
2330# thus allowing to reclaim back memory.
2331#
2332# Fragmentation is a natural process that happens with every allocator (but
2333# less so with Jemalloc, fortunately) and certain workloads. Normally a server
2334# restart is needed in order to lower the fragmentation, or at least to flush
2335# away all the data and create it again. However thanks to this feature
2336# implemented by Oran Agra for Redis 4.0 this process can happen at runtime
2337# in a "hot" way, while the server is running.
2338#
2339# Basically when the fragmentation is over a certain level (see the
2340# configuration options below) Redis will start to create new copies of the
2341# values in contiguous memory regions by exploiting certain specific Jemalloc
2342# features (in order to understand if an allocation is causing fragmentation
2343# and to allocate it in a better place), and at the same time, will release the
2344# old copies of the data. This process, repeated incrementally for all the keys
2345# will cause the fragmentation to drop back to normal values.
2346#
2347# Important things to understand:
2348#
2349# 1. This feature is disabled by default, and only works if you compiled Redis
2350#    to use the copy of Jemalloc we ship with the source code of Redis.
2351#    This is the default with Linux builds.
2352#
2353# 2. You never need to enable this feature if you don't have fragmentation
2354#    issues.
2355#
2356# 3. Once you experience fragmentation, you can enable this feature when
2357#    needed with the command "CONFIG SET activedefrag yes".
2358#
2359# The configuration parameters are able to fine tune the behavior of the
2360# defragmentation process. If you are not sure about what they mean it is
2361# a good idea to leave the defaults untouched.
2362
2363# Active defragmentation is disabled by default
2364# activedefrag no
2365
2366# Minimum amount of fragmentation waste to start active defrag
2367# active-defrag-ignore-bytes 100mb
2368
2369# Minimum percentage of fragmentation to start active defrag
2370# active-defrag-threshold-lower 10
2371
2372# Maximum percentage of fragmentation at which we use maximum effort
2373# active-defrag-threshold-upper 100
2374
2375# Minimal effort for defrag in CPU percentage, to be used when the lower
2376# threshold is reached
2377# active-defrag-cycle-min 1
2378
2379# Maximal effort for defrag in CPU percentage, to be used when the upper
2380# threshold is reached
2381# active-defrag-cycle-max 25
2382
2383# Maximum number of set/hash/zset/list fields that will be processed from
2384# the main dictionary scan
2385# active-defrag-max-scan-fields 1000
2386
2387# Jemalloc background thread for purging will be enabled by default
2388jemalloc-bg-thread yes
2389
2390# It is possible to pin different threads and processes of Redis to specific
2391# CPUs in your system, in order to maximize the performances of the server.
2392# This is useful both in order to pin different Redis threads in different
2393# CPUs, but also in order to make sure that multiple Redis instances running
2394# in the same host will be pinned to different CPUs.
2395#
2396# Normally you can do this using the "taskset" command, however it is also
2397# possible to this via Redis configuration directly, both in Linux and FreeBSD.
2398#
2399# You can pin the server/IO threads, bio threads, aof rewrite child process, and
2400# the bgsave child process. The syntax to specify the cpu list is the same as
2401# the taskset command:
2402#
2403# Set redis server/io threads to cpu affinity 0,2,4,6:
2404# server-cpulist 0-7:2
2405#
2406# Set bio threads to cpu affinity 1,3:
2407# bio-cpulist 1,3
2408#
2409# Set aof rewrite child process to cpu affinity 8,9,10,11:
2410# aof-rewrite-cpulist 8-11
2411#
2412# Set bgsave child process to cpu affinity 1,10,11
2413# bgsave-cpulist 1,10-11
2414
2415# In some cases redis will emit warnings and even refuse to start if it detects
2416# that the system is in bad state, it is possible to suppress these warnings
2417# by setting the following config which takes a space delimited list of warnings
2418# to suppress
2419#
2420# ignore-warnings ARM64-COW-BUG

安装

 1# 主机上先创建映射目录
 2mkdir -p /app/redis/conf
 3
 4# 在目录下创建并配置相应版本的redis.conf文件
 5/app/redis/conf/redis.conf
 6# 配置项注意事项
 7# 1、开启redis验证--密码：requirepass 123456  （可选）
 8# 2、允许redis外地连接：注释掉 bind 127.0.0.1  （必选）
 9# 3、daemonize no 将daemonize yes注释或daemonize no设置，因为该配置和docker run -d 参数冲突
10# 4、开启redis数据持久化appendonly yes        （可选）
11
12# 启动服务
13docker run -d -p 6379:6379 --privileged=true \
14-v /app/redis/conf:/usr/local/etc/redis \
15-v /app/redis/data:/data \
16--name myredis redis redis-server /usr/local/etc/redis/redis.conf
17# docker 中的配置文件路径也可以是/etc/redis/redis.conf

验证

1docker exec -it myredis /bin/bash
2redis-cli
3# 容器内执行
4set k1 v1
5get k1
6ping
7
8# 选择库15，返回OK
9select 15

修改配置文件中的数据库个数，databases 16 修改为 databases 10，重启容器再验证。

1docker restart myredis
2
3docker exec -it myredis /bin/bash
4redis-cli
5# 选择库15，
6select 15
7(error) ERR DB index is out of range

安装nginx

提前准备

 1# 主机上创建nginx映射目录
 2mkdir -p /app/nginx/conf
 3mkdir -p /app/nginx/log
 4mkdir -p /app/nginx/html
 5
 6# 将容器中的默认配置文件复制到宿主机，以便修改：
 7docker run --name temp-nginx -d nginx
 8docker cp temp-nginx:/etc/nginx/nginx.conf /app/nginx/conf/nginx.conf
 9docker cp temp-nginx:/etc/nginx/conf.d /app/nginx/conf/conf.d
10docker cp temp-nginx:/usr/share/nginx/html /app/nginx/html
11docker rm -f temp-nginx
12
13# 拷贝后检查/app/nginx下各个目录的文件是否正确。

启动 Nginx 容器

1docker run \
2 -p 8080:80 \
3 --name nginx --privileged=true \
4 -v /app/nginx/conf/nginx.conf:/etc/nginx/nginx.conf \
5 -v /app/nginx/conf/conf.d:/etc/nginx/conf.d \
6 -v /app/nginx/log:/var/log/nginx \
7 -v /app/nginx/html:/usr/share/nginx/html \
8 -d nginx:latest

验证

  1. 如果是云服务器，先开通8080访问端口。

  2. 浏览器输入：http://ip:8080/进行访问。

Docker 进阶 的子部分

  • Docker

01 Mysql主从复制

一主一从架构搭建

主从术语演变

数据库 旧术语 新术语 版本
MySQL Master/Slave Source/Replica 8.0+

主节点环境准备

注意主机到主节点容器的映射目录和端口

1docker run  -d -p 3307:3306 --privileged=true \
2-v /app/mysql/source/log:/var/log/mysql \
3-v /app/mysql/source/data:/var/lib/mysql \
4-v /app/mysql/source/conf:/etc/mysql/conf.d \
5-e MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=123456 \
6--name mysql_source mysql:8.4.8

主节点my.cnf 配置

 1[mysqld]
 2# [必须]主服务器唯一ID
 3server-id=1
 4
 5# [必须]启用二进制日志,指名路径。比如：自己本地的路径/log/mysqlbin
 6log-bin=mysql-bin
 7
 8# [可选] 0（默认）表示读写（主机），1表示只读（从机）
 9read-only=0
10
11# [可选]设置不要复制的数据库
12binlog-ignore-db=test,mysql
13
14# [可选]设置需要复制的数据库,默认全部记录。比如：binlog-do-db=my_test
15binlog-do-db=my_test
16
17# [可选]设置binlog格式
18binlog_format=STATEMENT
19
20# 设置日志文件保留的时长，单位是秒
21binlog_expire_logs_seconds=6000
22
23# 控制单个二进制日志大小。此参数的最大和默认值是1GB
24max_binlog_size=200M
25
26# 设置二进制日志使用内存大小（事务）
27binlog_cache_size=1M
28
29# 二进制日志过期清理时间，默认为0，表示不自动清理
30# 5.7 及以前	expire_logs_days	唯一选项
31# 8.0.0 - 8.0.28	expire_logs_days 和 binlog_expire_logs_seconds	两者共存，建议使用新的
32# 8.0.29+	binlog_expire_logs_seconds	expire_logs_days 被弃用
33# 8.4.0+	binlog_expire_logs_seconds	expire_logs_days 被移除
34# expire_logs_days=7
35binlog_expire_logs_seconds=604800
36
37# 跳过主从复制中遇到的所有错误或指定类型的错误，避免slave端复制终端
38# 如：1062错误是指一些主键重复，1032错误是因为从数据库数据不一致
39slave_skip_errors=1062

主节点mysql数据库中配置

 1# 1. 配置文件完成后，先删除之前的容器，重新启动一个新的容器。
 2docker rm -f $(docker ps --filter "name=mysql_source" --filter "status=running" -q)
 3
 4docker run  -d -p 3307:3306 --privileged=true \
 5-v /app/mysql/source/log:/var/log/mysql \
 6-v /app/mysql/source/data:/var/lib/mysql \
 7-v /app/mysql/source/conf:/etc/mysql/conf.d \
 8-e MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=123456 \
 9--name mysql_source mysql:8.4.8
10
11# 2. 在数据库中创建同步用户并赋权限
12docker exec mysql_source mysql -u root -p123456 -e "
13CREATE USER IF NOT EXISTS 'replica'@'%' IDENTIFIED BY '123456';
14GRANT REPLICATION SLAVE, REPLICATION CLIENT ON *.* TO 'replica'@'%';
15"
警告

配置后不要在主节点创建数据库等操作。

从节点环境准备

注意主机到从节点容器的映射目录和端口

1docker run  -d -p 3308:3306 --privileged=true \
2-v /app/mysql/replica1/log:/var/log/mysql \
3-v /app/mysql/replica1/data:/var/lib/mysql \
4-v /app/mysql/replica1/conf:/etc/mysql/conf.d \
5-e MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=123456 \
6--name mysql_replica1 mysql:8.4.8

从节点my.cnf配置

 1[mysqld]
 2# [必须]主服务器唯一ID
 3server-id=2
 4
 5# [必须]启用二进制日志,指名路径。比如：自己本地的路径/log/mysqlbin
 6log-bin=mysql-replica1-bin
 7
 8# [可选] 0（默认）表示读写（主机），1表示只读（从机）
 9read-only=1
10
11# [可选]设置不要复制的数据库
12binlog-ignore-db=test,mysql
13
14# [可选]设置需要复制的数据库,默认全部记录。比如：binlog-do-db=my_test
15binlog-do-db=my_test
16
17# [可选]设置binlog格式
18binlog_format=STATEMENT
19
20# 设置日志文件保留的时长，单位是秒
21binlog_expire_logs_seconds=6000
22
23# 控制单个二进制日志大小。此参数的最大和默认值是1GB
24max_binlog_size=200M
25
26# 设置二进制日志使用内存大小（事务）
27binlog_cache_size=1M
28
29# 二进制日志过期清理时间，默认为0，表示不自动清理
30# 5.7 及以前	expire_logs_days	唯一选项
31# 8.0.0 - 8.0.28	expire_logs_days 和 binlog_expire_logs_seconds	两者共存，建议使用新的
32# 8.0.29+	binlog_expire_logs_seconds	expire_logs_days 被弃用
33# 8.4.0+	binlog_expire_logs_seconds	expire_logs_days 被移除
34# expire_logs_days=7
35binlog_expire_logs_seconds=604800
36
37# 跳过主从复制中遇到的所有错误或指定类型的错误，避免slave端复制终端
38# 如：1062错误是指一些主键重复，1032错误是因为从数据库数据不一致
39slave_skip_errors=1062
40
41# relay_log配置中继日志
42relay_log=mysql-relay-bin
43
44# log_slave_updates表示slave将复制事件写进自己的二进制日志
45log_slave_updates=1

重启从节点mysql数据库

1# 1. 配置文件完成后，先删除之前的容器，重新启动一个新的容器。
2docker restart $(docker ps --filter "name=mysql_replica1" --filter "status=running" -q)
3docker ps -a

从节点配置需要复制的主节点

查看主节点的状态，并记录下File和Position的值。

1docker exec mysql_source mysql -u root -p123456 -e "
2SHOW BINARY LOG STATUS;
3"
  • 这里有个坑，之前的命令SHOW MASTER STATUS;和SHOW SOURCE STATUS;都不能用，执行HELP SHOW;命令查看所有的show命令。
​
1-- 命令模板，这个是8.4版本以上的模板，和之前的模板关键字完全不同。
2CHANGE REPLICATION SOURCE TO
3SOURCE_HOST='主机的IP地址或宿主机的IP地址',
4SOURCE_USER='复制用户名',
5SOURCE_PASSWORD='复制用户的密码',
6SOURCE_PORT=3307,
7SOURCE_LOG_FILE='mysql-bin.具体数字',
8SOURCE_LOG_POS=具体值,
9SOURCE_CONNECT_RETRY=30;
MySQL 版本 旧语法 新语法 状态
MySQL 5.7 CHANGE MASTER TO CHANGE MASTER TO 正常
MySQL 8.0 CHANGE MASTER TO CHANGE REPLICATION SOURCE TO 混合支持
MySQL 8.4 已弃用 CHANGE REPLICATION SOURCE TO 推荐使用新语法

配置命令，注意执行的是从节点mysql库。

 1docker exec mysql_replica1 mysql -u root -p123456 -e "
 2CHANGE REPLICATION SOURCE TO
 3SOURCE_HOST='10.0.0.16',
 4SOURCE_USER='replica',
 5SOURCE_PASSWORD='123456',
 6SOURCE_PORT=3307,
 7SOURCE_LOG_FILE='mysql-bin.000003',
 8SOURCE_LOG_POS=158,
 9SOURCE_CONNECT_RETRY=30;
10"

从节点查看主从复制的状态

参数值如果是NO，说明未开启。

1docker exec mysql_replica1 mysql -u root -p123456 -e "
2SHOW REPLICA STATUS \G
3" | grep -E 'Replica_IO_Running|Replica_SQL_Running'

从节点开启主从复制

 1# 1. 开启主从复制
 2docker exec mysql_replica1 mysql -u root -p123456 -e "
 3start replica;
 4SHOW REPLICA STATUS \G
 5"
 6
 7# 解决问题时先停主从复制
 8docker exec mysql_replica1 mysql -u root -p123456 -e "
 9stop replica;
10"
11
12docker exec mysql_replica1 mysql -u root -p123456 -e "
13reset replica;
14"

启动报错解决方法：

 1Last_IO_Error: Error connecting to source 'replica@10.0.0.16:3307'. This was attempt 1/10, with a delay of 30 seconds between attempts. Message: Authentication plugin 'caching_sha2_password' reported error: Authentication requires secure connection.
 2
 3# 获取公钥而不使用SSL
 4
 5docker exec mysql_replica1 mysql -u root -p123456 -e "
 6STOP REPLICA;
 7RESET REPLICA ALL;
 8
 9CHANGE REPLICATION SOURCE TO
10SOURCE_HOST='10.0.0.16',
11SOURCE_USER='replica',
12SOURCE_PASSWORD='123456',
13SOURCE_PORT=3307,
14SOURCE_LOG_FILE='mysql-bin.000003',
15SOURCE_LOG_POS=158,
16SOURCE_CONNECT_RETRY=30,
17SOURCE_SSL=0,
18GET_SOURCE_PUBLIC_KEY=1;
19
20START REPLICA;
21SHOW REPLICA STATUS \G
22"
23
24#

Replica_IO_Running和Replica_SQL_Running 的状态都为“YES”，说明链路打通。

验证

 1# 1. 主库建库
 2docker exec mysql_source mysql -u root -p123456 -e "
 3create database my_test;
 4" 2>&1 | grep -v "Using a password"
 5
 6# 2. 从库查询
 7docker exec mysql_replica1 mysql -u root -p123456 -ss -e "
 8SHOW REPLICA STATUS \G
 9SHOW databases;
10" 2>&1 | grep -v "Using a password"
11
12# 3. 主库建表查数据
13docker exec mysql_source mysql -u root -p123456 -e "
14use my_test;
15create table tb01(id int, name varchar(50));
16insert into tb01(id, name) values(1, 'tom');
17insert into tb01(id, name) values(2, '张三');
18" 2>&1 | grep -v "Using a password"
19
20# 4. 从库查询表数据
21docker exec mysql_replica1 mysql -u root -p123456 -e "
22use my_test;
23select * from tb01;
24" 2>&1 | grep -v "Using a password"

同步报错解决

1Last_IO_Error: Fatal error: The replica I/O thread stops because source and replica have equal MySQL server ids; these ids must be different for replication to work (or the --replicate-same-server-id option must be used on replica but this does not always make sense; please check the manual before using it).
2
3# 从节点没有配置my.cnf，重新配置后，从节点配置步骤重新执行一次后续操作。
4
5docker exec mysql_source mysql -u root -p123456 -e "
6drop database my_test;
7create database my_test;
8" 2>&1 | grep -v "Using a password"
  • Devops

工欲善其事，必先利其器。

  • Docker

02 redis集群

三主三从集群

搭建集群

集群架构

图中的port是理想状态，部署时以实际情况为准。

容器启动配置

​
 1# Redis 服务器参数:--cluster-enabled (集群) --appendonly (AOF) --port (Redis 服务监听端口，默认6379)
 2docker run -d --net host --privileged=true -v /app/redis/share/redis-node-1/data:/data --name redis-node-1 redis:latest --cluster-enabled yes --appendonly yes --port 6381
 3
 4docker run -d --net host --privileged=true -v /app/redis/share/redis-node-2/data:/data --name redis-node-2 redis:latest --cluster-enabled yes --appendonly yes --port 6382
 5
 6docker run -d --net host --privileged=true -v /app/redis/share/redis-node-3/data:/data --name redis-node-3 redis:latest --cluster-enabled yes --appendonly yes --port 6383
 7
 8docker run -d --net host --privileged=true -v /app/redis/share/redis-node-4/data:/data --name redis-node-4 redis:latest --cluster-enabled yes --appendonly yes --port 6384
 9
10docker run -d --net host --privileged=true -v /app/redis/share/redis-node-5/data:/data --name redis-node-5 redis:latest --cluster-enabled yes --appendonly yes --port 6385
11
12docker run -d --net host --privileged=true -v /app/redis/share/redis-node-6/data:/data --name redis-node-6 redis:latest --cluster-enabled yes --appendonly yes --port 6386

构建主从关系

参数说明：

  • --cluster-replicas 1 指定每个主节点的从节点数量。
  • --cluster-yes自动回答 “yes” 确认提示
 1# 通过docker exec 命令进入任意一个容器实例，构建主从集群。本次选择node-1
 2docker exec -it redis-node-1 /bin/bash
 3redis-cli --cluster create 10.0.0.16:6381 10.0.0.16:6382 10.0.0.16:6383 10.0.0.16:6384 10.0.0.16:6385 10.0.0.16:6386 --cluster-replicas 1
 4
 5# 以下是命令回显，根据提示输入 yes
 6>>> Performing hash slots allocation on 6 nodes...
 7Master[0] -> Slots 0 - 5460
 8Master[1] -> Slots 5461 - 10922
 9Master[2] -> Slots 10923 - 16383
10Adding replica 10.0.0.16:6385 to 10.0.0.16:6381
11Adding replica 10.0.0.16:6386 to 10.0.0.16:6382
12Adding replica 10.0.0.16:6384 to 10.0.0.16:6383
13...
14Can I set the above configuration? (type 'yes' to accept): yes
15...
16[OK] All nodes agree about slots configuration.
17>>> Check for open slots...
18>>> Check slots coverage...
19[OK] All 16384 slots covered.

查看集群信息

​
 1# 容器中执行命令
 2redis-cli -p 6381
 3127.0.0.1:6381> cluster info
 4
 5# 回显信息
 6cluster_state:ok # 状态
 7cluster_slots_assigned:16384
 8cluster_slots_ok:16384 # 槽位
 9...
10cluster_known_nodes:6 # 集群节点
11...
​
 1# 容器中执行命令
 2redis-cli -p 6381
 3127.0.0.1:6381> cluster nodes
 4
 5# 回显信息，主从关系
 6657c3b89c1983d109ec6e381ac7acaa682ca8d41 10.0.0.16:6384@16384 slave ec22dbd80ce8ef411cffe8efd00a3ec1cc79169d 0 1773923378403 1 connected
 7aba4086cdd75c65e18d2f55fd56ccc849030c779 10.0.0.16:6383@16383 master - 0 1773923381414 3 connected 10923-16383
 80e9cb6303e819e1137bacdafbed13a3af8dfaa9a 10.0.0.16:6382@16382 master - 0 1773923380411 2 connected 5461-10922
 902f988f852358a4ef9a6b2b1a0cd3005cbf7ed86 10.0.0.16:6386@16386 slave aba4086cdd75c65e18d2f55fd56ccc849030c779 0 1773923379407 3 connected
100ee1c6ffc560e806886f63998d2460f81e31e157 10.0.0.16:6385@16385 slave 0e9cb6303e819e1137bacdafbed13a3af8dfaa9a 0 1773923380000 2 connected
11ec22dbd80ce8ef411cffe8efd00a3ec1cc79169d 10.0.0.16:6381@16381 myself,master - 0 0 1 connected 0-5460

集群验证

​
1# 容器中执行命令
2redis-cli -p 6381
3127.0.0.1:6381> set k1 v1
4(error) MOVED 12706 10.0.0.16:6383 # key值计算后超出 6381 redis容器的槽位
5127.0.0.1:6381> set k2 v2
6OK
7127.0.0.1:6381> set k4 v4
8(error) MOVED 8455 10.0.0.16:6382 # key值计算后超出 6381 redis容器的槽位
​
 1# 容器中执行命令
 2redis-cli -p 6381 -c
 3
 4127.0.0.1:6381> set k1 v1
 5-> Redirected to slot [12706] located at 10.0.0.16:6383 # 根据key值计算的槽位，重定向redis机器
 6OK
 710.0.0.16:6383> set k2 v2
 8-> Redirected to slot [449] located at 10.0.0.16:6381
 9OK
1010.0.0.16:6381> set k3 v3
11OK
1210.0.0.16:6381> set k4 v4
13-> Redirected to slot [8455] located at 10.0.0.16:6382
14OK
​
 1# redis-cli --cluster help  查看详细子命令介绍
 2root@VM-0-16-debian:/data# redis-cli --cluster check 10.0.0.16:6381
 310.0.0.16:6381 (ec22dbd8...) -> 2 keys | 5461 slots | 1 slaves.
 410.0.0.16:6383 (aba4086c...) -> 1 keys | 5461 slots | 1 slaves.
 510.0.0.16:6382 (0e9cb630...) -> 1 keys | 5462 slots | 1 slaves.
 6[OK] 4 keys in 3 masters.
 70.00 keys per slot on average.
 8>>> Performing Cluster Check (using node 10.0.0.16:6381)
 9M: ec22dbd80ce8ef411cffe8efd00a3ec1cc79169d 10.0.0.16:6381
10   slots:[0-5460] (5461 slots) master
11   1 additional replica(s)
12S: 657c3b89c1983d109ec6e381ac7acaa682ca8d41 10.0.0.16:6384
13   slots: (0 slots) slave
14   replicates ec22dbd80ce8ef411cffe8efd00a3ec1cc79169d
15M: aba4086cdd75c65e18d2f55fd56ccc849030c779 10.0.0.16:6383
16   slots:[10923-16383] (5461 slots) master
17   1 additional replica(s)
18M: 0e9cb6303e819e1137bacdafbed13a3af8dfaa9a 10.0.0.16:6382
19   slots:[5461-10922] (5462 slots) master
20   1 additional replica(s)
21S: 02f988f852358a4ef9a6b2b1a0cd3005cbf7ed86 10.0.0.16:6386
22   slots: (0 slots) slave
23   replicates aba4086cdd75c65e18d2f55fd56ccc849030c779
24S: 0ee1c6ffc560e806886f63998d2460f81e31e157 10.0.0.16:6385
25   slots: (0 slots) slave
26   replicates 0e9cb6303e819e1137bacdafbed13a3af8dfaa9a
27[OK] All nodes agree about slots configuration.
28>>> Check for open slots...
29>>> Check slots coverage...
30[OK] All 16384 slots covered.

运维场景

主从切换

​
 1# 停容器实例
 2docker stop redis-node-1
 3docker ps
 4
 5# 登录其他容器节点查看集群情况
 6docker exec -it redis-node-2 /bin/bash
 7# 容器内执行命令
 8redis-cli -p 6382
 9cluster nodes
10
11# 回显信息
120e9cb6303e819e1137bacdafbed13a3af8dfaa9a 10.0.0.16:6382@16382 myself,master - 0 0 2 connected 5461-10922
13ec22dbd80ce8ef411cffe8efd00a3ec1cc79169d 10.0.0.16:6381@16381 master,fail - 1773925990613 1773925987000 1 disconnected
14aba4086cdd75c65e18d2f55fd56ccc849030c779 10.0.0.16:6383@16383 master - 0 1773926038000 3 connected 10923-16383
1502f988f852358a4ef9a6b2b1a0cd3005cbf7ed86 10.0.0.16:6386@16386 slave aba4086cdd75c65e18d2f55fd56ccc849030c779 0 1773926036812 3 connected
160ee1c6ffc560e806886f63998d2460f81e31e157 10.0.0.16:6385@16385 slave 0e9cb6303e819e1137bacdafbed13a3af8dfaa9a 0 1773926038821 2 connected
17657c3b89c1983d109ec6e381ac7acaa682ca8d41 10.0.0.16:6384@16384 master - 0 1773926037817 7 connected 0-5460

可以看到6381已下线，6384切换为master。

​
 1root@VM-0-16-debian:/data# redis-cli -p 6382 -c
 2127.0.0.1:6382> get k1
 3-> Redirected to slot [12706] located at 10.0.0.16:6383
 4"v1"
 510.0.0.16:6383> get k2
 6-> Redirected to slot [449] located at 10.0.0.16:6384
 7"v2"
 810.0.0.16:6384> get k3
 9"v3"
1010.0.0.16:6384> get k4
11-> Redirected to slot [8455] located at 10.0.0.16:6382
12"v4"

原来6381上的业务数据，通过6384节点也可以正常查询到。

​
 1# 启容器实例
 2docker start redis-node-1
 3docker ps
 4
 5# 登录其他容器节点查看集群情况
 6docker exec -it redis-node-2 /bin/bash
 7# 容器内执行命令
 8redis-cli -p 6382
 9cluster nodes
10
11# 回显信息
120e9cb6303e819e1137bacdafbed13a3af8dfaa9a 10.0.0.16:6382@16382 myself,master - 0 0 2 connected 5461-10922
13ec22dbd80ce8ef411cffe8efd00a3ec1cc79169d 10.0.0.16:6381@16381 slave 657c3b89c1983d109ec6e381ac7acaa682ca8d41 0 1773926572056 7 connected
14aba4086cdd75c65e18d2f55fd56ccc849030c779 10.0.0.16:6383@16383 master - 0 1773926574062 3 connected 10923-16383
1502f988f852358a4ef9a6b2b1a0cd3005cbf7ed86 10.0.0.16:6386@16386 slave aba4086cdd75c65e18d2f55fd56ccc849030c779 0 1773926572000 3 connected
160ee1c6ffc560e806886f63998d2460f81e31e157 10.0.0.16:6385@16385 slave 0e9cb6303e819e1137bacdafbed13a3af8dfaa9a 0 1773926573000 2 connected
17657c3b89c1983d109ec6e381ac7acaa682ca8d41 10.0.0.16:6384@16384 master - 0 1773926573059 7 connected 0-5460

6384为master，6381为从机。

​
 1# 在6384为master，6381为slave，都是正常状态运行情况下。
 2# 1. stop 6384
 3docker stop redis-node-4
 4
 5# 2. 6381 节点切换为master后，start 6384，主从切换有个心跳检测的过程。
 6docker start redis-node-4
 7
 8# 3. 检查集群状态。
 9docker exec -it redis-node-2 /bin/bash
10# 容器内执行命令
11redis-cli -p 6382
12cluster nodes

集群扩容

​
1docker run -d --net host --privileged=true -v /app/redis/share/redis-node-7/data:/data --name redis-node-7 redis:latest --cluster-enabled yes --appendonly yes --port 6387
2
3docker run -d --net host --privileged=true -v /app/redis/share/redis-node-8/data:/data --name redis-node-8 redis:latest --cluster-enabled yes --appendonly yes --port 6388
4
5docker ps

通过领路人（6381）找到组织（集群），然后加入集群。

​
 1# 登录到redis新节点6387
 2docker exec -it redis-node-7 /bin/bash
 3
 4# redis-cli --cluster add-node 新节点IP:端口 领路人IP:端口
 5redis-cli --cluster add-node 10.0.0.16:6387 10.0.0.16:6381
 6
 7# 命令回显
 8...
 9[OK] All nodes agree about slots configuration.
10>>> Check for open slots...
11>>> Check slots coverage...
12[OK] All 16384 slots covered.
13>>> Getting functions from cluster
14>>> Send FUNCTION LIST to 10.0.0.16:6387 to verify there is no functions in it
15>>> Send FUNCTION RESTORE to 10.0.0.16:6387
16>>> Send CLUSTER MEET to node 10.0.0.16:6387 to make it join the cluster.
17[OK] New node added correctly.
​
 1redis-cli --cluster check 10.0.0.16:6381
 2
 3# 命令回显
 4root@VM-0-16-debian:/data# redis-cli --cluster check 10.0.0.16:6381
 510.0.0.16:6381 (ec22dbd8...) -> 2 keys | 5461 slots | 1 slaves.
 610.0.0.16:6382 (0e9cb630...) -> 1 keys | 5462 slots | 1 slaves.
 710.0.0.16:6387 (36054bac...) -> 0 keys | 0 slots | 0 slaves.  # 6387 已经加入集群，未分配槽位，无从机
 810.0.0.16:6383 (aba4086c...) -> 1 keys | 5461 slots | 1 slaves.
 9[OK] 4 keys in 4 masters.
100.00 keys per slot on average.
11...
12M: 36054bac1321fe2fb9c1d145ac9db9a65a2aec06 10.0.0.16:6387   # 6387 为Master节点
13   slots: (0 slots) master
14M: aba4086cdd75c65e18d2f55fd56ccc849030c779 10.0.0.16:6383
15   slots:[10923-16383] (5461 slots) master
16   1 additional replica(s)
17[OK] All nodes agree about slots configuration.
18>>> Check for open slots...
19>>> Check slots coverage...
20[OK] All 16384 slots covered.
​
 1# redis-cli --cluster reshard 10.0.0.16:6381
 2root@VM-0-16-debian:/data# redis-cli --cluster reshard 10.0.0.16:6381
 3...
 4M: 36054bac1321fe2fb9c1d145ac9db9a65a2aec06 10.0.0.16:6387
 5   slots: (0 slots) master
 6...
 7[OK] All 16384 slots covered.
 8How many slots do you want to move (from 1 to 16384)? 4096   # 16384/集群主节点个数
 9What is the receiving node ID? 36054bac1321fe2fb9c1d145ac9db9a65a2aec06  # 6387 节点ID
10Please enter all the source node IDs.
11  Type 'all' to use all the nodes as source nodes for the hash slots.
12  Type 'done' once you entered all the source nodes IDs.
13Source node #1: all    # 选择all，所有节点重新分配
14
15Ready to move 4096 slots.
16...
17Do you want to proceed with the proposed reshard plan (yes/no)? yes
18...
​
 1redis-cli --cluster check 10.0.0.16:6381
 2
 3# 命令回显
 4root@VM-0-16-debian:/data# redis-cli --cluster check 10.0.0.16:6381
 510.0.0.16:6381 (ec22dbd8...) -> 1 keys | 4096 slots | 1 slaves.
 610.0.0.16:6382 (0e9cb630...) -> 1 keys | 4096 slots | 1 slaves.
 710.0.0.16:6387 (36054bac...) -> 1 keys | 4096 slots | 0 slaves. # 6387 已经分配槽位
 810.0.0.16:6383 (aba4086c...) -> 1 keys | 4096 slots | 1 slaves.
 9...
10M: ec22dbd80ce8ef411cffe8efd00a3ec1cc79169d 10.0.0.16:6381
11   slots:[1365-5460] (4096 slots) master # 每个主节点都匀一部分槽位出来
12...
13M: 0e9cb6303e819e1137bacdafbed13a3af8dfaa9a 10.0.0.16:6382
14   slots:[6827-10922] (4096 slots) master
15   1 additional replica(s)
16M: 36054bac1321fe2fb9c1d145ac9db9a65a2aec06 10.0.0.16:6387
17   slots:[0-1364],[5461-6826],[10923-12287] (4096 slots) master # 6387的槽位是从3个主节点匀来的
18M: aba4086cdd75c65e18d2f55fd56ccc849030c779 10.0.0.16:6383
19   slots:[12288-16383] (4096 slots) master
20...
21[OK] All 16384 slots covered.

新加入节点分配槽位，不是整个集群从头重新分配槽位，只是从之前的主节点匀一部分给新节点，满足分配规则即可。目的是为了集群稳定性。

​
 1# 命令格式：redis-cli --cluster add-node 待挂载从机IP:端口 待挂载主机IP:端口 --cluster-slave --cluster-master-id 待挂载主机的集群ID
 2redis-cli --cluster add-node 10.0.0.16:6388 10.0.0.16:6387 --cluster-slave --cluster-master-id 36054bac1321fe2fb9c1d145ac9db9a65a2aec06
 3
 4# 命令回显
 5>>> Adding node 10.0.0.16:6388 to cluster 10.0.0.16:6387
 6>>> Performing Cluster Check (using node 10.0.0.16:6387)
 7...
 8[OK] All nodes agree about slots configuration.
 9>>> Check for open slots...
10>>> Check slots coverage...
11[OK] All 16384 slots covered.
12>>> Send CLUSTER MEET to node 10.0.0.16:6388 to make it join the cluster. # 6388 加入到集群
13Waiting for the cluster to join
14
15>>> Configure node as replica of 10.0.0.16:6387. # 6388 从6387复制数据，即从机
16[OK] New node added correctly.
​
 1redis-cli --cluster check 10.0.0.16:6382
 2
 3# 命令回显
 4root@VM-0-16-debian:/data# redis-cli --cluster check 10.0.0.16:6382
 510.0.0.16:6382 (0e9cb630...) -> 1 keys | 4096 slots | 1 slaves.
 610.0.0.16:6381 (ec22dbd8...) -> 1 keys | 4096 slots | 1 slaves.
 710.0.0.16:6383 (aba4086c...) -> 1 keys | 4096 slots | 1 slaves.
 810.0.0.16:6387 (36054bac...) -> 1 keys | 4096 slots | 1 slaves. # 6387 下已有从机
 9...
10S: 6bcc56caea65061f501f42601852f294aaa2912b 10.0.0.16:6388
11   slots: (0 slots) slave
12   replicates 36054bac1321fe2fb9c1d145ac9db9a65a2aec06  # 主机集群ID
13...
14M: 36054bac1321fe2fb9c1d145ac9db9a65a2aec06 10.0.0.16:6387
15   slots:[0-1364],[5461-6826],[10923-12287] (4096 slots) master
16   1 additional replica(s)
17[OK] All nodes agree about slots configuration.
18>>> Check for open slots...
19>>> Check slots coverage...
20[OK] All 16384 slots covered.

集群缩容

​
 1# 命令格式 redis-cli --cluster del-node ip:从机端口 从机6388集群节点ID
 2docker exec -it redis-node-1 redis-cli --cluster check 10.0.0.16:6382
 3docker exec -it redis-node-1 redis-cli --cluster del-node 10.0.0.16:6388 6bcc56caea65061f501f42601852f294aaa2912b
 4
 5# 回显
 6root@VM-0-16-debian:~# docker exec -it redis-node-1 redis-cli --cluster del-node 10.0.0.16:6388 6bcc56caea65061f501f42601852f294aaa2912b
 7>>> Removing node 6bcc56caea65061f501f42601852f294aaa2912b from cluster 10.0.0.16:6388
 8>>> Sending CLUSTER FORGET messages to the cluster...
 9>>> Sending CLUSTER RESET SOFT to the deleted node.
10
11# 再次检查集群
12docker exec -it redis-node-1 redis-cli --cluster check 10.0.0.16:6382

本次分配槽位号，为了方便，一次将所有槽号都给6381。

​
